title: Periodontal Disease and Poor Oral Hygiene: 9 Herbal Essential Oils for Treatment
description: Salvia officinalis essential oils contain compounds like thujone, camphor, and borneol, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties that help combat periodontal disease. This condition, characterized by gum inflammation and tooth loss, is often caused by bacteria in the mouth. Salvia officinalis essential oils can inhibit the growth of these bacteria, reducing the severity of the disease.
